summary: Review only notes an incorrect concert date; no information on recording or performance quality.
review: The sole reviewer points out that the tape is mislabeled as 10/11/89 when it should be 10/11/80, offering no commentary on the soundboard source, audio clarity, or musical performance. Consequently, there are no insights into standout moments, band playing, or technical fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review focusing on a metadata error; no data to assess musical or recording quality, leading to a conservative low rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on audio clarity, mix, or source type; review solely mentions wrong date.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No commentary on set structure or performance quality.
